scope_contract: In --changed-files mode this inspector uses Mechanism (ii): inspector-side tagging. Every finding includes introduced_in_diff: bool. Only findings with introduced_in_diff: true are eligible to block close per AC-2.6(b). Pre-existing findings (introduced_in_diff: false) are advisory and non-blocking.

naming_violations.reason: Output JSON Report section (line 218) shows stale example filename 'test_AC_01_<uid>.py' (zero-padded two-digit). The canonical Output Contract spec (line 41) and all generated cycles since 20260521-090100 use 'test_AC<NN>_<ac_uid>.py' (no zero-padding). The example is internally inconsistent with the contract and with the actual files in scope. The test files themselves (test_AC1..5) are correctly named per the implemented convention and must NOT be renamed.
naming_violations.recommendation: Update agents/test-writer.md line 218 example from 'test_AC_01_<uid>.py' to 'test_AC<NN>_<ac_uid>.py' to match the operative convention.
naming_violations.codex_disposition: applied — codex confirmed test files are correctly named per canonical spec; only the stale template example in agents/test-writer.md needs updating; test files must not be renamed

non_functional_folders.reason: New directory created this cycle (introduced in commit af96c61). Contains only tmp-cleanup-install.sh and has no README.md of its own. The parent scripts/README.md and scripts/INDEX.md already document install/ and list tmp-cleanup-install.sh. The directory is a purposeful install-manifest location per spec R2. Advisory only.
non_functional_folders.recommendation: Optional: add a brief README.md to scripts/install/ documenting that this directory holds install-manifest mirrors of production system scripts per spec R2. Not blocking.
non_functional_folders.codex_disposition: applied — codex flagged this should be observation_only since scripts/install/ is documented in parent scripts/README.md and INDEX.md and the directory has a clear spec mandate

orphaned_subagents.reason: detect-orphan-agents.sh reports product-owner.md is not referenced by any command using static text search. However this is a detector false positive: product-owner is invoked dynamically as a specialist by commands/dev.md and commands/dev-overnight.md workflow orchestration. Pre-existing finding.
orphaned_subagents.recommendation: Update detect-orphan-agents.sh to recognize dynamically-orchestrated specialist agents. Do not delete or archive agents/product-owner.md.
orphaned_subagents.codex_disposition: applied — codex confirmed product-owner.md is workflow-orchestrated; deletion would be unsafe

unreferenced_scripts.reason: detect-orphan-scripts.sh flags this as having no functional invocation references in commands/agents/scripts. However this is an intentional design: install mirrors are standalone recovery artifacts meant to be applied manually on host rebuild. Required by AC3 and spec R2. Orphan classification is a false positive for this category. Introduced in this cycle.
unreferenced_scripts.recommendation: Whitelist scripts/install/*-install.sh from orphan detection, or count AC/dev-report install-manifest references as functional evidence. Do not delete.
unreferenced_scripts.codex_disposition: applied — codex confirmed false positive; intentional standalone install-manifest per AC3; deletion would violate cycle contract

unreferenced_scripts.reason: 72 days old, commit_count=1, no detected static references. Pre-existing. scripts/todo/*.py files may be dynamically loaded by the slash-command todo injection mechanism.
unreferenced_scripts.recommendation: Verify whether /site-navigate command exists before treating as orphan.

stale_readme.reason: README.md was auto-generated when only test_AC1_927f9894faf67349.py existed. The AUTO section shows 'Total files: 1' and 'Subdirectories: 0', listing only test_AC1. The directory contains 6 generated artifacts (manifest.json plus test_AC1 through test_AC5). INDEX.md is correctly up-to-date. Introduced in this diff since these files are new in this cycle.
stale_readme.recommendation: Regenerate tests/generated/20260522-000000/README.md via the doc-sync hook to update the AUTO section to reflect all 6 entries.
stale_readme.codex_disposition: applied — codex confirmed this finding is legitimate; corrected wording to reflect 6 entries (manifest.json plus 5 test files)

.gitignore.notes: Correctly structured with inline comments. !docs/reference/ negation below docs/* rule follows established !docs/dev/ pattern. logs/* + !logs/lifecycle.jsonl follows correct per-file negation pattern. No issues.

scripts/score-update.sh.notes: uncapped_delta field added correctly at line 152 and 164. Referenced by commands/dev.md, agents/dev.md, agents/qa.md. No dead functions. venv activation present per spec. No issues.

docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md.notes: Spec file in canonical location docs/dev/specs/. 2 days old, scope-contained commit. Not archive candidate. No naming violations.

tests/generated/20260522-000000/test_AC1.notes: Real implementation. AC_UID/AC_TYPE preserved. test_AC1() naming matches convention. No TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel. Non-orphaned test.

tests/generated/20260522-000000/test_AC2.notes: Tests logs/lifecycle.jsonl negation and logs/* blanket rule. No issues.

tests/generated/20260522-000000/test_AC3.notes: Tests scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh content parity, shebang, mode 755, git tracking. No issues.

tests/generated/20260522-000000/test_AC4.notes: Tests uncapped_delta using temporary file with try/finally cleanup. Avoids live agent-scores.json. No issues.

tests/generated/20260522-000000/test_AC5.notes: Tests spec+views commit presence and scope containment. FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS comprehensive. No issues.

summary.verdict_rationale: All 8 changed files are correctly placed in canonical directories. No misplaced docs, no temp files, no duplicate scripts, no dead functions introduced. The two minor findings with introduced_in_diff: true are both advisory: (1) a stale README auto-section in the test cycle directory (INDEX.md is correct; this is a doc-sync regeneration task), and (2) a stale template example in agents/test-writer.md Output JSON Report section (actual test files are correctly named). Neither rises to a cleanliness blocking condition. All pre-existing orphan/unreferenced script findings are advisory and non-blocking under --changed-files mode scope contract. No Safety Rules violated.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex (gpt-5.5, xhigh reasoning, 107,544 tokens) reviewed 6 draft findings and flagged 7 issues. Key corrections: (1) test files are correctly named; only template example in agents/test-writer.md is stale. (2) scripts/install/ should be observation_only — parent docs cover it. (3) product-owner orphan is a detector false positive — dynamically orchestrated. (4) tmp-cleanup-install.sh is intentional standalone install mirror; introduced_in_diff inconsistency corrected. (5) scripts/todo/*.py may be dynamically loaded; all pre-existing and non-blocking. (6) stale README finding legitimate with corrected file count of 6. (7) Safety confirmed: no deletions proposed.

findings.issue: Finding 1 framed test files as naming_violation requiring rename — test files are correctly named; only agents/test-writer.md template example line 218 is stale
findings.proposed_fix: Restructure Finding 1 to target stale template example; do not rename test files
findings.rationale: Canonical spec line 41 and all implemented cycles since 20260521-090100 use test_AC<NN>_ without zero-padding. Finding restructured accordingly.

findings.issue: Finding 2 (scripts/install/ missing README) should be observation_only
findings.rationale: Parent scripts/README.md and scripts/INDEX.md document install/. Leaf README absence is advisory.

findings.issue: Finding 3 (product-owner orphan) is a detector false positive
findings.proposed_fix: Mark observation_only; do not delete agents/product-owner.md
findings.rationale: product-owner is invoked as specialist by commands/dev.md and commands/dev-overnight.md.

findings.issue: Finding 4 has introduced_in_diff inconsistency and is false positive for orphan classification
findings.proposed_fix: Mark observation_only, correct introduced_in_diff to true
findings.rationale: tmp-cleanup-install.sh is intentional standalone recovery artifact per AC3. Deletion would violate cycle contract.

findings.issue: Finding 5 (scripts/todo/*.py orphans) may be false positives — todo scripts dynamically loaded
findings.proposed_fix: Retain as pre-existing advisory observations; update orphan detector
findings.rationale: All Finding 5 items are pre-existing and advisory per --changed-files scope contract.

findings.issue: Finding 6 stale README wording had incorrect file count — should be 6 entries not 8
findings.proposed_fix: Keep as minor stale_readme with corrected count of 6
findings.rationale: README.md and INDEX.md are not counted as generated artifacts in doc-sync AUTO section.

findings.issue: Safety rule: deletion of tmp-cleanup-install.sh, scripts/todo/*.py, or agents/product-owner.md would be unsafe
findings.proposed_fix: Add safe_to_delete: false to all affected entries
findings.rationale: All affected findings include safe_to_delete: false and action: observation_only.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 7 Codex PROPOSED_FIX items applied. Finding 1 restructured to target stale template not test files. Finding 2 demoted to observation_only. Finding 3 marked observation_only with detector improvement note. Finding 4 corrected to observation_only with introduced_in_diff: true and safe_to_delete: false. Finding 5 retained as pre-existing advisory. Finding 6 file count corrected to 6. safe_to_delete: false added to all relevant entries.
